# Transfer Learning

**Summary**: A machine learning technique where a model developed for one task is reused as the starting point for another.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] applied transfer-learning to transition from velocity inversion to acoustic impedance inversion.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Transfer learning was 98.11% faster and 25.73% more accurate than training from scratch. ([[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023, p. 67]])
